title: MCIP ContributionStatement v1
description: A declaration of what kind of new contribution a packet's proof represents, given the literature landscape found by its IdeaAttribution/PriorArtMatch/CitationReview records. Kernel verification alone never implies a contribution_class — this is a separate, explicit editorial claim. Multiple statements may exist over time (e.g. revised after a later literature review); the most recent is authoritative for publication decisions, but earlier ones are not deleted.

known_prior_art_refs.description: record_id values of PriorArtMatch (or, lacking a specific match, LiteratureSource) entries this statement accounts for.

citation_review_ids.description: record_id values of the CitationReview entries this statement is based on.
